codeReview.summary: The fix correctly addresses the reported BackfillScheduler regressions: monotonic/idempotent cursor advancement now tolerates floating-point Date precision, and failing test semantics were corrected for backward-advance direction and tolerant Date assertions. No blocking correctness issues were found in the reviewed diff.

issues.description: The doc comment says newUpperBound must be strictly greater, but implementation now intentionally allows equal timestamps (idempotent) and small epsilon tolerance. Update comment text to avoid contract ambiguity for future maintainers.
